💥 Clipping
-0.1 to 0 dBFS

🟢 Studio
-18 to -12 dBFS
Pristine Pass
🟡 Standard
-24 to -6 dBFS
Safe Pass

-45 to -30 dBFS
-1% / block
🔇 Dead Air
< -50 dBFS
-3% / sec
